strategy: Raid boss with 20,000 health, 150% damage boost, and 50% pierce. Bring a full team with a dedicated hitter and heavy healing.
He resists Ice and Death 100% (useless) and 70% Storm, Myth, and Balance. Hit with Fire or Life (only 40% resist), or use prisms.
Use the inspired casts you are handed (Brush Fire, Levin Bruin, Rotting Fomori, War Oracle) for extra damage without spending your own pips.
Avoid single blades: any blade triggers Wall of Blades on him. Blade only in the same round you hit, or lean on enchants and auras.
Do not trap him directly. A trap triggers Backfire. Rely on hit-round blades and the inspired casts.
He self-buffs Power Current every round and follows Scion of Fire/Ice with a Fire Elf or Snow Serpent. Burst him rather than out-grinding the buffs.
cheatNotes: You get Brush Fire, Levin Bruin, Rotting Fomori, and War Oracle as free inspired casts. Use them for extra damage without spending pips.
He stacks Power Current on himself every round, so his hits ramp. Do not let this drag; burst him.
After a Scion of Fire he adds a Fire Elf. Expect the extra DoT and heal or shield through it.
After a Scion of Ice he adds a Snow Serpent. Same plan, be ready for the follow-up hit.
Any blade you cast triggers Wall of Blades on him. Blade only in the same round you attack, or use your enchants and the inspired casts.
Trapping him triggers Backfire. Skip traps and win through blades and inspired casts instead.
